mapper.sql:
SELECT A.SEQ, A.EMPID, A.EAT_DATE, A.EAT_NAME, NVL(B.LOCAL_NAME, A.EMPLOYEE_NAME) AS LOCAL_NAME, TO_CHAR(A.R_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS R_DATE, TO_CHAR(A.R_TIME, 'HH24:MI') AS R_TIME, A.AMOUNT, (CASE WHEN A.EAT_DATE IN ('BREAKFAST', 'NIGHT') THEN TO_CHAR(A.R_TIME - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD') ELSE TO_CHAR(A.R_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD') END) AS ATTENDANCE_DATE, GET_AR_TIME_BY_CPNYID( GET_PERSON_ID(A.EMPID), CASE WHEN A.EAT_DATE IN ('BREAKFAST', 'NIGHT') THEN TO_CHAR(A.R_TIME - 1, 'YYYY/MM/DD') ELSE TO_CHAR(A.R_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD') END, 'OUT_DATE_TIME', #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS OUTDOOR_TIME, CASE WHEN GET_DEPT_NAME(B.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) = '' OR GET_DEPT_NAME(B.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) IS NULL THEN A.DEPART_NAME ELSE GET_DEPT_NAME(B.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) END AS DEPTNAME, A.REMARK, GET_CODE_NAME(B.POST_GRADE_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_GRADE_NAME, A.INSERT_BY FROM AR_MAC_RECORDS_HTSV_EAT A LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE B ON A.EMPID = B.EMPID WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( UPPER(A.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(NVL(B.LOCAL_NAME, A.EMPLOYEE_NAME))) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND B.DEPTNO IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(',' || #{deptNos, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || ',', ',' || B.DEPTNO || ',') > 0
AND A.R_TIME >= TO_DATE(#{fromDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND A.R_TIME < TO_DATE(#{toDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND A.EAT_DATE = #{eatDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AR_MAC_RECORDS_HTSV_EAT ( SEQ, CPNY_ID, EMPID, EMPLOYEE_NAME, R_TIME, EAT_NAME, DEPART_NAME, INSERT_BY ) VALUES ( AR_MAC_RECORDS_TSTO_EAT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_DATE(#{cardTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI'), #{doorName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{departName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'M' )
